titleStmt.title: SII 31.29: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 29. (A.R. No. B 301 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fourth pillar inside the kalyāṇa maṇḍapa of Viṭṭhalēśvarasvāmi, temple.
This is dated Śaka 1174, Parīdhāvi, Āsvīja, ba. Friday, Tulā sankrānti, Corresponding to September 20, 1252 A.D.

It states that while mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kākatīya Gaṇapati was ruling the country, Paripūrṇa Śiva mahāmuni granted the gift of land measuring 3 kha as pannasa situated in the land belonging to the god Peddaviddēśvara at Bhaṭṭiprōlu to Daṇḍasāni, the daughter of Yolyala [Mē]ḍasāni, for the merit of his father Viśvēśvara Śiva mahāmuni. Viśvēśvara Śiva mahāmuni is described as the religious preacher (gurulu) of the king Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1174 nēṁṭī paridhāvi saṁ
vatsara Āśvayuja bahu
ḷa śukravāramu nāṁḍu tu
lā saṁkrāṁti nimityamu
na śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva

ra kākatiyya gaṇapatidēva
ya mahārājulu gurulu viśvēśvara
śiva mahāmunulu vāri
koḍku paripū¨rṇa śivamahā
munulu tanu taṁḍri viśvēśvara
śiva mahāmunulaku dha

¨rmmu vugānu yolyala mē
ḍasāni kūṁtuṟu daṁḍa
sāni śrīmadbaṭṭīproli
pedda viddēśvaradēvara pola
mu lōna kha 3 pansa
gā niccitimi . Ācaṁdrā¨rkka

sdhāyigānu biḍḍa biḍḍa tara
mu dēvaraṁgolici sukhama
nubhaviṁppagalavāru . paṁḍḍe
preggaḍa Apparāju koḍuku Ama
rīśvara peggaḍavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
